notes: Current explicit-facts bottleneck is sample scarcity plus preview admission alignment, not corpus split logic.
LLVM test PE binaries produced a small number of explicit candidates, but the current blocked candidates are rejected before direct preview due to unsupported architecture.
Admission-mismatch sources should remain outside the strict explicit candidate pool even when they carry explicit facts.
Current heuristic corpus remains valid and separated; explicit corpus needs preview-aligned PE sources rather than provisional blocked-seed promotion.
Recent source expansion widened the search pool, but did not yet produce a strict explicit direct-preview seed.
